title: Bridge Essay: Auricular vagus nerve stimulator for closed-loop biofeedback-based operation.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Breath/Soul** (Phase 2) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Breath/Soul to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Auricular vagus nerve stimulator for closed-loop biofeedback-based operation.** — Analog Integr Circuits Signal Process. PMID: 35571976. DOI: 10.1007/s10470-022-02037-8. Auricular vagus nerve stimulation (aVNS) is anovel neuromodulatory therapy used for treatment of various chronic systemic disorders. Currently, aVNS is non-individualized, disregarding the physiological state of the patient and therefore making it difficult to reach optimum therapeutic outcomes. Aclosed-loop aVNS system is required to avoid over-stimulation and under-stimulation of patients, leading to personalized and thus improved therapy.
